mapper.insert: INSERT INTO class_room (name, org_id, disorder_types) VALUES (#{name}, #{orgId}, #{disorderTypes})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, org_id, disorder_types FROM class_room WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, org_id, disorder_types FROM class_room WHERE org_id = #{orgId} ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE class_room SET name = #{name}, org_id = #{orgId}, disorder_types = #{disorderTypes} WHERE id = #{id}
